messages.name: S1F1 - Are You There Request
messages.description: Equipment 向 Host 发送在线检查请求

messages.name: S1F2 - Are You There Reply

messages.description: Host 请求 Equipment 的选定状态变量值

messages.name: S1F4 - Selected Equipment Status Reply
messages.description: Equipment 回复选定状态变量值列表

messages.name: S1F6 - List Alarmed Variables Reply

messages.name: S1F12 - Status Variable Namelist Reply
